title: The Last Leaf – Flashcard Concept Mastery
author: O. Henry

questions.question: Who are Sue and Johnsy?
questions.correct_answer: Two young artists who share a small flat
questions.explanation: Sue and Johnsy live together in a small apartment and support each other as friends and artists.

questions.question: What illness does Johnsy suffer from?
questions.explanation: Johnsy becomes seriously ill with pneumonia during the winter.

questions.question: Why does Johnsy count the falling leaves?
questions.correct_answer: She believes she will die when the last leaf falls
questions.explanation: Johnsy loses hope and connects her life with the falling leaves of the ivy creeper.
questions.source_section: Johnsy looking out of the window

questions.question: Who is Behrman?
questions.correct_answer: An old painter who lives in the same building
questions.explanation: Behrman is a sixty-year-old artist who dreams of painting a masterpiece.

questions.question: What was Behrman’s lifelong dream?
questions.explanation: Behrman always wanted to create a great painting that would be remembered.

questions.question: Why does the last leaf not fall?
questions.correct_answer: Because Behrman painted it on the wall
questions.explanation: Behrman secretly paints the leaf during a stormy night to give Johnsy hope.

questions.question: What happens to Behrman after painting the leaf?
questions.explanation: Behrman becomes ill after going out in the cold storm to paint the leaf.

questions.question: Why is Behrman’s painting called a masterpiece?
questions.correct_answer: Because it saves Johnsy’s life by giving her hope
questions.explanation: The painted leaf restores Johnsy’s will to live, making it Behrman’s greatest work.

questions.question: What change occurs in Johnsy at the end of the story?
questions.correct_answer: She regains hope and decides to live
questions.explanation: Seeing the leaf survive the storm inspires Johnsy to fight her illness.

questions.question: What is the main message of the story ‘The Last Leaf’?
questions.correct_answer: Hope, friendship, and sacrifice can save lives
questions.explanation: The story highlights the power of hope and selfless sacrifice.

notes.title: Power of Hope
notes.content: Hope and positive thinking play an important role in overcoming illness and difficulties.

notes.title: Behrman’s Sacrifice
notes.content: Behrman sacrifices his life to paint the last leaf and save Johnsy.

facts.fact: The story ‘The Last Leaf’ is written by O. Henry.
Behrman paints the leaf during a stormy night to give Johnsy hope.
